raw_text: Service very good but not giving 5 star because Blinkit does not Exchange or Refund for the items which are not up to the mark ...They only take feedback 😕,which does not solve the problem.

I had a disappointing experience with Blinkit. I was charged a ₹9 handling fee, but the bag provided was too small and the items didn’t even fit properly. This defeats the purpose of the charge. Additionally, the delivery partner took a photo during delivery without clearly explaining why, which felt uncomfortable and unnecessary. Overall, this experience was not satisfactory. If you are charging extra, at least ensure proper packaging and better customer handling.
the service allover is very good but don't charge handling fees . I am a regular customer and it's very disappointing that I have to pay 8 rupees extra as handling fee whenever I order.

awful , disappointed, as I ordered the wrong product that needed a replacement still they said No ,in spite of the 7 days replacement policy , already sent necessary details and screenshot of Customer Care chatting through the email. Support staff is also not co operation, Electronics item this platform is not Good .

I ordered an earphone from Blinkit And It Was Delivered Faulty To Me . And , There was 7 Days Replacement For The Product , I Tried To Replace My Product I Keep Connecting Customer Care , They Said " We Cannot Help In It " . And I Was Unable To Replace my product , And I Wasted My Money For The Product By Ordering From This App , Please Do Not Download This App Or If Download Then Order Very Carefully Otherwise You will be scammed .

one time my friend ordered some gifts from blanket on my birthday and the location was picked up like 10 km far away from my current location so they cancelled the order and they said that the refund will be initiated in 4 to 5 working day and the amount is not initiated yet then not reliable in the refund policy they say that they will refund the amount but they don't
really bad, no customer support, I had ordered a print, and I got it in terrible condition and I have tried to get help for more then hours but can't find any help... highly dissapointing.

they have not given my refund yet. they are just telling me you can ask your bank. but I already contacted the bank and they said you didn't get any refund from the blanket. blinkit service is so worst it's very difficult to get the refund back. so worst condition of the blanket.
Every time I try to place an order they show too many charges. Most frustrating is the High demand surcharge. not using this app anymore. There are too many better options available.

I am extremely upset with Blinkit. Their return and refund policy is a complete scam. They happily take your money, but if they deliver defective, missing, or wrong items, they refuse to issue a refund. The customer support team is incredibly rude, unhelpful, and acts like they don't care about loyal customers. Total waste of money and a highly frustrating experience. Uninstalled! Their delivery might be fast, but their customer support and refund policies are a total joke.

My order was placed at 4:43 pm. BlinkIt added handling charge, surcharge charge, and rain charge. Store is 1.6 km away.  15 minutes later, I'm still waiting for a delivery guy to be assigned. Why should a customer pay so many charges if you don't even have delivery guys available? You are delivery companies. How can you not have delivery guys? That's your whole job.

on the 1st it will be look like it was much better of all but at the 4th or 5th order they say that there has a surge charge 30rs until umyou get 499rs+ cost of orders. May be this was too wrong. Give all 199+ free delevery without surge charge.

Quick delivery and average product quality. Buy diary & cut fruits products at random quality. Service is so bad with default response, hope the quality will improve and add the expiry date, so customer won't fall for clearance stock/items. Have to spend additional efforts for store mishandling. still dairy items delivered are not fresh, more prone to spoil in summer.

They customer support is rlyyy fast I recently ordered a small packet of bread and the slices were broken I raised a ticket and it was re sent after 5 minutes, although they do charge extra sometimes which is my issue but other than that this is a rly good good app 😃

The app page has too many options in a row. Confuses the person with way too many options than what is searched for they have ai virtual assistant for customer service. it does not read the image sent to the help chat. pathetic. loss of money

At first, Blinkit was not working here, then the APP service started, it is very good! But whenever I order something, I used to pay online, but I may not be online all the time, then what will happen? Today, I order something on Blinkit. Since I did not have money online, I thought I would take the thing on cash on delivery, but the person who comes to deliver cannot pay. Then I have to do it online from my friend with a lot of difficulty. I'm so disappointed blinkit

Stopped using grofer after grofer ate my orange cash of 3600, said expired since I did not order for six months but did not see the fact that they were not delivering to my area during lockdow, try jio mart now, it's cheaper and has more options, haven't improved in 2026.

Ordered a pain relief product early in the morning during an emergency, but received an empty box. The delivery partner asked me to contact customer support, and support said the item was out of stock so they couldn't replace it. Instead, I was told to wait 3 days for a refund. Very disappointing experience. When someone orders a pain relief product, they need it urgently, not an empty box and hours spent with customer support while in pain. This incident has seriously reduced my trust in Blink

This blinkit is not that good, sometimes if you ask for two items, you get the item in one and an empty box in the other and these people are not able to solve the problem of that, so Dum People are ready. So for this, these people need to work a little in customer service.

It makes my every day life better... whenever I need anything, I just ordered and some moments later, the thing came at my doorstep... I don't have to go to any convenience store to buy stuff... also the things I cannot get here before, but now I get those things easily at blinkit... so it's a very good deal for me....
